subcodes.first_line: My spirit be a sacrifice unto Thy presence! This evanescent servant testifieth that he hath been honored with a letter, every letter of which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحضرتک الفداء یشهد هذا الخادم الفانی بانه قد تشرف بکتاب کان کل حرف منه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment
